case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TERRY HUNTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $21.03 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, TERRY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, TERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 6TH STREET #434, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
